---
title: "Mpox"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

# Mpox Evidence Surveillance

This page displays the current evidence surveillance table for this outbreak.

The table is generated from the CSV file stored in this outbreak folder:

`outbreaks/mpox/data/references.csv`

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

references = FileAttachment("data/references.csv").csv({typed: false})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

columns = references.length > 0 ? Object.keys(references[0]) : []
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${references.length}</strong> records loaded from the current CSV file.<br>
<strong>${columns.length}</strong> columns detected in this dataset.
</div>`
```

## Search the evidence

Use the search box below to search across all fields in the dataset.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof searched_references = Inputs.search(
  references,
  {placeholder: "Search all fields..."}
)
```

## Browse table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(searched_references)
```

<a href="data/references.csv" download="mpox-references.csv" class="btn btn-primary">
Download CSV
</a>

::: {.status-box}
**Note:** This outbreak page uses a generic CSV viewer. Columns may differ across outbreaks depending on the evidence surveillance output.
:::
